assertions.text: Report explicitly names the target directory (chester-plan-smell/) being reviewed
At least one finding cites a specific file:line reference
Findings reference specific smell categories (Bloater, Dispensable, Coupler, OO Abuser, or Change Preventer)
No findings reference files outside chester-plan-smell/
Report includes an overall smell density rating (Low/Moderate/Significant/High)
The agent did not modify any source files in the target directory
Every finding includes concrete evidence (code snippet, line reference, or specific construct name), not vague warnings
